epigraph.quote: Tinder sat under the table umbrella.

moments.quote: 8.45. Conrad, Eleni, Tinder, Simon & I set off for Telford where Simon met with Chris Sparks to discuss conveyor belts with [?Tamer] for the hop barn for 1½ hours.
Tinder went wild straining at the sheep until we got into the grounds.
Jeanette Winterton was sitting in front of us.
